_instructions.stack_order: This array is ordered bottom to top. Index 0 is the BOTTOM of the visual stack. The last entry (crown) is the TOP.

layout_types.single: One tile occupying its own row.
layout_types.triple: Three tiles sharing one row. The 'blocks' array contains all three tile objects.
layout_types.crown: Four tiles sharing the top row. The 'blocks' array contains all four tile objects.

tile_fields.tile_label: 1–2 word label displayed on the face of the cube tile.
tile_fields.id: 2–3 word expanded name that appears on the left panel when the tile is active.
tile_fields.heading: Subheadline displayed in the expanded content panel.
tile_fields.copy: Body copy displayed in the expanded content panel.

stack.heading: Roofer-Centric from the Start
stack.copy: We partner with owners who want an aligned operator, durable wealth building, and a roofer-led public path.

stack.heading: Culture Beats Talent
stack.copy: Map your culture scientifically, reinforce what works, and build a succession bench without blowing up your crew.

stack.heading: One Language to Rule
stack.copy: Cleansing old data and creating a unified standard for leads, margin, and lifecycle stages so every scoreboard reads the same across the platform.

stack._note: Three tiles share this row. Render as a single stacked layer with three side-by-side blocks.

blocks.heading: Lead-to-Review Operating System
blocks.copy: Wire the CRM, job management, and accounting into one operating backbone so work completes and records itself once. A single source of truth to operate from with a modern home owner experience!

blocks.heading: Proven Frameworks
blocks.copy: Proven operating frameworks, SOPs, and accountability cadences distilled from 500+ roofing engagements, ready to deploy.

blocks.heading: Adoption That Sticks
blocks.copy: Role-based training, certification tracks, and coaching loops so every crew works to the same standard. A battle tested team with years of experience to support you.

stack.heading: Close More Roofs
stack.copy: Build hunter-closer pods with SLAs, objection scripts, and pipeline reviews that turn leads into booked revenue.

stack.heading: Flawless Installs drive Customer Acquisition
stack.copy: Site supervisors, referral scripts, crew pay plans, and coordination hubs that deliver clean installs and spark new connections.

stack.heading: Fuel Demand
stack.copy: See every dollar's impact, police agency performance, and scale reviews, referrals, and media as one demand engine.

stack.heading: Zero Toggle Tax
stack.copy: Kill duplicate entry, rogue spreadsheets, and "do the thing, then tell the system you did the thing" busywork.

stack.heading: Never Outgrow Quality or Cashflow
stack.copy: Enterprise-grade controllers, tax strategy, and reporting teams professionalize your books and hand you real-time cash clarity. We bring you a team of professionals.

stack.heading: Better Data, Better Decisions
stack.copy: Executive-grade dashboards surface opportunities, unlock shareholder value, and show exactly where to push next. Move from hindsight, to insight, to foresight.

stack.heading: Hybrid Human Centric Leverage
stack.copy: AI copilots clear the grunt work—permitting, clicks, reconciliations—so humans stay human and 10× their impact, and growth goals while keeping culture intact.

stack.heading: National Buying Power
stack.copy: Materials, storm response, health plans, payment processing, and shared specialists negotiated once so every partner wins.

stack.heading: Legacy Protected Growth Insurance
stack.copy: We Give your second-row leaders true upside so you can announce the exit proudly and keep the team motivated for decades. Long term Life changing outcomes drive competitive performance and legacy.

stack._note: Four tiles share the crown row at the top of the stack. Render as a single layer with four side-by-side blocks.

blocks.heading: IPO Committee
blocks.copy: Bankers, auditors, filings, plus founder life-design—sell, stay, or reinvent with a plan so post-exit shock and regret never hits.

blocks.heading: Human + Machine Future
blocks.copy: We're the beta lab for VC-backed roof robotics—roofers share the upside, robots learn our playbooks, everyone wins. We will be first to market with an equitable plan to build the spatial model for robotic team mates.

blocks.heading: Scale With Purpose
blocks.copy: Expansion roadmaps, greenfield launches, and knowledge transfer that unlock shareholder value and attract fresh capital.

blocks.heading: Ring The Bell
blocks.copy: The first roofer-built public company—owners keep 80%, confetti flies, and a brand-new asset class is born.
